title: pyrethrum halleri
intro: Pyrethrum halleri is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as a subspecies of the Pyrethrum flower. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum halleri include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal agent, which is attributed to its rich content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pyrethrum halleri is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and creams, which are used to treat various health conditions, including skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
